title: Jacob's Craftable Debug Stick
description: it adds a crafting recipe to the debug stick
body:
**it adds a crafting recipe to the debug stick**

# Recipe:
- 2x Stick
- Sticky Piston
- Piston
- 2x Redstone
- Redstone Lamp
- 2x #stone

and the recipe is ~~shape~~less the recipe will also be in the gallery

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/112cd2cfa9b97a2b9e2a68b886d1382d50f1bb7d.png)

**Thanks for Downloading** the mod!
